titleStmt.title: SII 9.468: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 468. (A.R. No. 393 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP BY THE SIDE OF A HOUSE TO THE EAST OF THE TANK, DEVARAKERE AT BASRUR, COONDAPUR TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1395, Nandana, Bhādrapada, ba 8, Bu[dhavāra], corresponding to A.D. 1472 August 26, Wednesday, in the reign of Virūpāksha-Mahārāya. It records that, while Viṭṭharasa-Voḍeya was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya, Baḷḷābali Duggaṇa-Seṭṭi, and his nephews Sōvaṇa-Seṭṭi, son of Akka-Seṭṭiti, Nāgaṇa-Seṭṭi, son of Bāliyakka-Seṭṭiṭi, and Dēvu-Seṭṭi son of Nāvakka-Seṭṭiti, made a grant of some plots of land to Siriyappa, son of Tirumalanātha-Seṭṭi, for the worship of the god Viśvanātha, which he had brought from Benares, when he returned from his pilgrimage to that place. The gift was made on the occasion of a solar eclipse.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīgurubhyōnnamaḥ . śrī sarasvatyai namaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdra cā
maracāravē . trayilōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayābhyudayaśakavarṣa 1394 saṁdu A
yidaneya naṁdanasaṁvatsarada bhādrapada ba 8 bu lū śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa virupā
kṣamahārāyarū vijayanagarada siṁhāsanadaliddu sakala sāṁbrājyavanū Āḷuttiha kāladalli Avara nirū
padiṁda viṭhṭharasavoḍeyarū bārakūra rājyavanū pratipālisutaṁviha kāladalli . basuṟūra paḍuvakēriya
ṇasēnabōvara maga baḷḷābaḷiya duggaṇaseṭṭiyaru Avara Aḷiyaṁdiru Akkaseṭṭitiya maga sōvaṇaseṭṭi bāli
yakkaseṭṭittiya maga nāgaṇaseṭṭi sāvakkaseṭṭitiya maga dēuseṭṭi Iṁtī mūvaru tāya makkaḷū Ā duggaṇaseṭṭi
Iṁtī nālvaru voḍaṁbaṭṭu javarupāliya tirumalenāthaseṭṭara makkaḷu siriyappagaḷu vāraṇāsige hōgi Ā
vāraṇāsiyiṁda viśvanāthadēvaranū paṁcapūjesahitavāgi vijeyaṁgeyisikoṁḍu baralāgi Ā vāraṇāsi siriyappagaḷi
ge sūryyōparāga puṇyakāladalli Āduggaṇaseṭṭiyarū Avara Aḷiyaṁdirū dānadhārāpūrvvakavāgi dhāreyane
ṟadu koṭṭa dharmmada bāḷina vivara guḍḍaṁpāḍiya kaṟikeya kaḷiyalli nālvaṁḍeyali mūvattanālku muḍi Akki gēṇiyikkuva bā
ḷu Ā bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu daṇṇira sāliṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁkalū daṇṇira sāliṁdaṁ baḍagalu paḍuva
lu Uppunīrahoḷeyiṁdaṁ mūḍalu baḍagalu kaṟikeya Aṁṇṇahebbāruvana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ dharmmada bāḷiṁ
daṁ teṁkalu . Iṁtī catussīmeya Oḷaguḷa sarvvabāḷu mara phala Anubha mūvattu nālku muḍi ya Oḷage
nālku muḍi Akki teṟanū kaḷeci śuddha mūvattu muḍi Akki mattaṁ hatāvarada Oḷage Adhivāsada kāṭi mūvattu muḍi
bhatta gēṇibittuva bāḷu Ā bāḷina catussīmeya vivara mūḍalu Eḷaṟeyasāvaṁtana gaḍiyiṁdaṁ paḍuvalu teṁka
lu varada toḷahara baḷiya māṇikkaseṭṭiya gaḍiyiṁda baḍagalu . paḍuvala muddahaḷiya nāyakana gaḍi
yiṁdaṁ mūḍalu . baḍagalu kāḍiṁdaṁ teṁkalu Iṁtī catussīme Oḷaguḷa sarvvabāḷu mane ṭhāu mara
phala Anubha . mattaṁ kaṁdāvarada Oḷage helakāveyalli duggaṇaseṭṭiyara mūlada bāḷu hiriyagadde 1 kka
ṁnālkuvare muḍi mattaṁ kṛṣṇaupādhyana kayyali koṁḍadu kereya ṇikaneṁba gadde 1 kkaṁ Oṁduvare muḍi mattaṁ Ā beṭṭina
ḷage saha hanneraḍu muḍi tāṟuvāriya bageya beṭṭana Oḷage Āṟu muḍi A(ṁ)ntū Ippattanālku muḍiga
nakēṇiya bhatta nālvaṁḍeyalū muḍi Ayivattu mattaṁ rāmana koḍalu saha . A(ṁ)ntu �yo mūṟu bageya bāḷige gēṇiya Akki
muḍi 70 Eppattu muḍi Akki gēṇiyikuva bāḷanū Ā siriyappagaḷē teṟu dēvasvavanū tettu teppade dēvapūjeyanū mā
koṁḍu dīvaḷigeyahabbada mūṟu dinada raṁgapūjeyanū naḍasikoṁḍu bāḷuvaru . mattaṁ Ā viśvanāthadēvara naṁdādīptige Ā
duggaṇaseṭṭiyara hittila catussīmeya vivara mū . rājabīdiyiṁdaṁ pa . teṁ badāḍeya sōvaṇaseṭṭi
ba . pa . mahādēvarakeṟeya tūbina nīru hariva kōḍiṁdaṁ mū . ba .
catusīmeyoḷaguḷḷa mane tōṭavanū Anu The record is built in after this.
Digital edition of SII 9.468 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
